---
title: "Detection Explorer"
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(sf)
library(leaflet)

boundary102 <- readRDS(
  "data/boundary102.rds"
)

detections <- readRDS(
  "data/detections.rds"
)

boundary102 <-
  boundary102[
    boundary102$SiteName %in%
      unique(
        na.omit(
          detections$SiteName
        )
      ),
  ]

boundary102$SiteStatus_map <-
  ifelse(
    !is.na(boundary102$SiteStatus) &
      boundary102$SiteStatus == "Active",
    "Active",
    "Other"
  )

site_status_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#984EA3",
      "#BDBDBD"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Boundary geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Boundary geometry
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Apply the same small south adjustment used for detections.

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    32610
  )

geom_boundary <- st_geometry(boundary102) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(boundary102) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_boundary,
    32610
  )

boundary102 <-
  st_transform(
    boundary102,
    4326
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Rebuild detection geometry from x1_ / y1_
# Treat x1_ / y1_ as EPSG:32612,
# transform to EPSG:32610,
# move slightly south,
# then transform to WGS84
# ------------------------------------------------------------

detections_df <-
  if(inherits(detections, "sf")) {
    st_drop_geometry(detections)
  } else {
    detections
  }

detections_new <- st_as_sf(
  detections_df,
  coords = c(
    "x1_",
    "y1_"
  ),
  crs = 32612,
  remove = FALSE
) |>
  st_transform(
    32610
  )

# Small south adjustment
geom_det <- st_geometry(detections_new) + c(0, -25)

st_geometry(detections_new) <-
  st_set_crs(
    geom_det,
    32610
  )

detections_new <-
  st_transform(
    detections_new,
    4326
  )

detections <- detections_new

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Reduce point density for faster web-map rendering
# ------------------------------------------------------------

set.seed(1)

max_points_per_group <- 500

sample_ids <-
  unlist(
    tapply(
      seq_len(nrow(detections)),
      interaction(
        detections$tag_id,
        detections$behavior_type,
        drop = TRUE
      ),
      function(ii) {
        sample(
          ii,
          min(
            length(ii),
            max_points_per_group
          )
        )
      }
    )
  )

detections_map <-
  detections[
    sample_ids,
  ]

behavior_pal <-
  colorFactor(
    palette = c(
      "#E69F00",
      "#0072B2",
      "#009E73"
    ),
    domain = c(
      "migration",
      "premigration",
      "winter"
    )
  )

```

Interactive map of all detections.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

leaflet(
  width = "100%",
  height = "650px",
  options =
    leafletOptions(
      preferCanvas = TRUE
    )
) |>

  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap
  ) |>

  addPolygons(
    data = boundary102,
    fillColor =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    fillOpacity = 0.35,
    color =
      ~site_status_pal(
        SiteStatus_map
      ),
    weight = 2,
    opacity = 0.9,
    popup =
      ~paste0(
        "<b>Site:</b> ",
        SiteName,
        "<br><b>Status:</b> ",
        SiteStatus_map
      )
  ) |>

  addCircleMarkers(
    data = detections_map,

    radius = 3,

    stroke = FALSE,

    fillOpacity = 0.75,

    color =
      ~behavior_pal(
        behavior_type
      ),

    popup =
      ~paste0(
        "<b>Tag:</b> ",
        tag_id,

        "<br><b>Tracking:</b> ",
        tracking_period,

        "<br><b>Behavior:</b> ",
        behavior_type,

        "<br><b>Episode:</b> ",
        episode_type,

        "<br><b>Date:</b> ",
        obs_date,

        "<br><b>Site:</b> ",
        SiteName
      )

  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal = behavior_pal,
    values = detections_map$behavior_type,
    title = "Behavior Type",
    opacity = 1
  ) |>

  addLegend(
    position = "topleft",
    pal = site_status_pal,
    values = c(
      "Active",
      "Other"
    ),
    title = "Site Status",
    opacity = 1
  )

```
